latex: Anna is reading a 300-page book. She can read a page in two minutes. If she has finished reading 75 percent of the pages, how many minutes of reading does she have left?
notes: }  \textbf{Answer:} If Anna has finished reading 75 percent of the pages, that means that 25 percent, or 75 pages, are left. Since it takes her two minutes to read a page, it will take her $75\times 2 = \boxed{150}$ minutes to finish the book.       }
